title: Craft Obsidian
description: Craft obsidian with buckets of lava and water
body:
Craft obsidian with 1 to 8 buckets of lava and a single bucket of water. Super simple.

![Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NFoMGzJC/images/ae50eb11656e4abcefc67a8808caa8066738e908.png)

See [my other mods](https://modrinth.com/user/Pepsied)
